children.text: If your adjusted gross income was $64,000 or less, do your taxes for free with brand-name software available through IRS Free File.
Find a Volunteer Income Tax Assistance (VITA) or Tax Counseling for the Elderly (TCE) site that offers free tax help to people who make $54,000 or less, have disabilities, or speak limited English.
AARP Tax-Aide offers free tax preparation to all taxpayers and specializes in issues unique to seniors.
